chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-335 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.991/2022 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.992/2022 4. For hearing of main case 15.04.2022 Mr. Bhagwan Das Bheel, Advocate for petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner by way of instant petition under the garb of harassment has sought for restraint against the respondents from dispossessing him and his family members from the subject property and from registering the FIR against him or his family members without permission of this Court. Issue of dispossession from plot is involving factual controversy, same could not be resolved by this Court in its writ jurisdiction. The registration of criminal case is a legal function same could not be conditioned with permission of this Court under the garb of harassment; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with pending application. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
